post.summary: Sync exchange rates from external API

get.summary: Get a saving goal by ID
Get progress for a specific goal
Get the user's net worth goal

delete.summary: Delete the user's net worth goal

put.summary: Set (create or update) the user's net worth goal

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Format: YYYY-MM, empty for current month

get.summary: Get net worth trend over time

parameters.name: weekOf
parameters.description: Any date within the desired week

protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

v1Asset.title: Asset represents a user's asset or liability

v1AssetType.title: AssetType represents a type of asset

v1Budget.title: Budget represents a spending limit for a category

v1BudgetStatus.title: BudgetStatus shows current spending vs budget

v1CPFAccount.title: CPFAccount represents a user's CPF account balances

v1CPFContribution.title: CPFContribution represents a monthly CPF contribution

v1GoalProgress.title: GoalProgress shows progress toward a saving goal

amount.title: Decimal string to avoid floating point issues

v1Money.title: Money represents a monetary amount with currency

v1NetWorthGoal.title: NetWorthGoal represents a user's target net worth milestone

v1NetWorthGoalProgress.title: NetWorthGoalProgress shows progress toward the net worth goal

v1RefreshTokenRequest.title: RefreshTokenRequest to get new access token

v1SetNetWorthGoalRequest.title: SetNetWorthGoalRequest - create or update the net worth goal

baseCurrency.title: Optional, defaults to user's base currency

v1Transaction.title: Transaction represents a spending or income record
